narratives.full_description:
Lecture & Film Screening dedicated to the legendary Italian director Liliana Cavani as a part of “KIN” Women’s International Film Festival

The evening is dedicated to the legendary Italian director Liliana Cavani (Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement, 2023).

Liliana Cavani's Retrospective 
 Liliana Cavani's Retrospective 
 Lecture & Film Screening by Patrizia Fregonese de Filippo 
 
 The evening is dedicated to the legendary Italian director Liliana Cavani (Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement, 2023). 
 
 Liliana Cavani (January 12, 1933) is an Italian film director and screenwriter. Cavani became internationally known after the success of her 1974 feature film The Night Porter. In 2023, she received the Golden Lion for Lifetime Achievement at Venice IFF. 
 
 The Program: 
 18:00: Lecture on Liliana Cavani by Patrizia Fregonese de Filippo. 
 20:00: Screening of Cavani’s iconic feature film, "The Night Porter" (1974, 118 min). 
 
 Location : AGBU Armenia Hall, Melik-Adamyan 2/2 
 Date : 14 December 
 Language : English 
 
 
 Partners 
 Partners 
 
 Patrizia Fregonese de Filippo 
 
 Patrizia Fregonese de Filippo is an Italian writer, director, producer, Festival Director and organizer. She founded Cinema d’iDEA, the first Film Festival in Rome. She is currently working on a documentary about Liliana Cavani. 
 
 “KIN” Women’s International Film Festival 
 https://kinfestival.com/ 
 
The purpose of the KIN International Film Festival is to discuss the problem of Gender Equality through films, problems of violence, inequality, discrimination and other problems related to women’s rights and gender problems. 
 
 The festival’s goal is to promote women's creativity, establish a network between women filmmakers from different parts of the world and give hand to a better understanding of different cultures and each other.
